headline: US Oil, Gas Drillers Hang Back in Volatile Market
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday

headline: Baker Hughes Wins Cheniere Sabine Pass Awards to Drive LNG Growth
summary: BKR secures three Cheniere awards, expanding its role at the Sabine Pass LNG facility and strengthening its long-term growth in LNG infrastructure.

headline: SK Hynix and Oil Churn Wall Street Pre-Bell; Asia, Europe Up
summary: Wall Street futures pointed mixed and muted pre-bell Friday, as traders awaited South Korean chipmak

headline: Baker Hughes wins contracts for Cheniere’s Sabine Pass LNG expansion
summary: The contracts cover the supply of liquefaction equipment for Train 7, a boil-off gas re-liquefaction unit and gas turbine upgrades.

headline: Kodiak Gas Services (KGS) Could Be 20% Below Fair Value Following Baker Hughes Deal
summary: Kodiak Gas Services (KGS) has drawn fresh attention after agreeing a multi year power generation deal with Baker Hughes, targeting up to 1.8 gigawatts for data centers and behind the meter projects. See our latest analysis for Kodiak Gas Services. The Kodiak Gas Services share price has cooled slightly in the very short term, with a 1 day share price return down 3.84%. However, the 90 day share price return of 10.55% and 1 year total shareholder return of 120.84% point to strong momentum on a...

headline: Kodiak Gas Services (KGS) Stock Looks Stretched After Its 377% Three Year Run
summary: Kodiak Gas Services has delivered a very large 376.6% return over the past three years, yet its valuation checks and richer market multiples now point to a stock that may be pricing in a lot of good news already. A roughly 3.8x gain over three years puts Kodiak Gas Services among the stronger performers in the energy services space, which can leave new buyers more exposed if expectations ease from here. The multi year gas turbine partnership with Baker Hughes can support long term growth...
